_README: Template MCP servers file for Empact Partners team members. Copy to ~/.claude/mcp-servers.json and fill in the credentials. Ask Vlad (vlad@empact.partners) for keys on Slack DM.
_setup_steps: 2. Request credentials from Vlad in Slack DM. Specify which MCPs you need (based on your role).
3. Replace each ${PLACEHOLDER} with the credential you receive.
4. Remove the MCPs you don't need (keeps config lean).
5. Restart Claude Code to pick up the new config.

empact-notion._comment: Empact Partners Notion workspace. Required for all consultants (partner docs, style guides, playbooks).

firecrawl._comment: Web scraping for research, competitor analysis. Required for all roles that do content or audits.

slack-empact._comment: Empact Partners Slack workspace. Required for all consultants.

reddit._comment: Reddit API. Required for Reddit Marketing roles (Gabby, Heather, Shanal).

google-workspace-empact._comment: Gmail, Drive, Calendar for @empact.partners email. Required for all consultants.

_optional_mcps_request_if_needed.ahrefs: SEO research — request if you do SEO/off-page work (Gia, Leon)
_optional_mcps_request_if_needed.wordpress: WordPress REST API — request if you do WeCanTrack blog audits
_optional_mcps_request_if_needed.webflow: Webflow CMS — request if you manage SystemOne content
_optional_mcps_request_if_needed.typefully: Typefully social media scheduler — request if you manage LinkedIn content
